title: Milestone 3: Durable knowledge publication
summary: Make the last mile from strong session findings to repo-scoped memory and concepts low-friction, safe, and reviewable so durable lessons stop getting rediscovered across sessions.

acceptance.label: Strong session memories surface clear repo-promotion candidates with duplicate detection and sensible defaults.
Repo-scoped memory and concept publication support review, supersede, and retire flows that feel safe to use routinely.
Real tasks promote the strongest architectural or workflow lessons without flooding repo knowledge with one-off notes.
